creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 172286
Update math/saga from 2.3.0 to 2.3.1

SAGA GIS version 2.3.1 has some important bugfixes and a few new features:

- New library 'imagery_isocluster'
- Record statistics in 'table_calculus'
- Better io_gdal shapes import
- Updates to scripting tools


Tested with Poudriere (F093i/a, F10.3a and HEADa), also 'portlint -AC' is fine.
